item_name: Application for Claim of Attendance on Medical Grounds
description: Official form to claim attendance on medical grounds.
submission_rule: The completed and signed application should be submitted to the office of the Principal through the Head of the Department within three days of resuming attendance.
condonation_rule: The page states that students with overall attendance greater than 60 percent and less than 75 percent alone are eligible for condonation of attendance on medical grounds.
